documents.title: Goblin Cartographer
documents.text: A goblin cartographer marks hidden tunnels, bridge crossings, and safe routes through the old mine.

documents.title: Healing Draught
documents.text: The alchemist records a crimson healing draught that restores weary adventurers after battle.

documents.title: Winter Rations
documents.text: Quartermasters store salted beans, hardtack, and dried apples for journeys through snowbound passes.

queries.text: Who knows the safe tunnels through the mine?
Which note describes a potion that helps after a fight?
